metaDescription: Claude Opus 4.7 (Anthropic), released 2026-04-16 — part of the Claude Opus line. Stronger software engineering and long-running coding; higher-resolution visio…
overview: Claude Opus 4.7 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Opus line. Released 2026-04-16. Anthropic's flagship Claude tier — most capable Opus-class model for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agentic work.

What's notable in this version: Stronger software engineering and long-running coding; higher-resolution vision (~3.3x); new xhigh effort level. Removed sampling params and budget_tokens (adaptive thinking only). Same $5/$25 pricing.
